City Council

 

Walterboro City Council meets on the 1st Tuesday of each month January through December at 6:00 P.M. Meetings are held at City Hall, 242 Hampton Street, Walterboro, South Carolina.

City Council Meetings are open to the public.  Agendas (along with meeting link) are posted online and on City Hall bulleton boards at least 24 hours prior to a meeting.  Notice of called, special, cancelled or rescheduled board meetings are made in the same manner.
